title: lippia chrysantha
intro: Lippia chrysantha, also known as sweet golden, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Lippia chrysantha include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
